boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match despite urgent email tone.

final_answer: Source records show unresolved three-way match plus approver limit dependency. Control record SRC-D0B364456A0A-CTL explicitly fails to close the exact invoice release boundary. Urgent tone and vendor history do not substitute for source authority. Action may not proceed; escalate for missing approver limit closure.
